hypothesis: Concrete eBPF Bytecode Modification:** Define the input unsorted data buffer using a `BPF_MAP_TYPE_ARRAY` strictly flagged with `BPF_F_RDONLY_PROG` at map creation. Modify the bytecode to perform sequential `BPF_LDX | BPF_MEM | BPF_DW` (load double word) operations from this immutable map, holding the data in eBPF registers (R1-R5) to act as a pseudo-SIMD vector. After applying the in-register branchless sorting logic, emit the sorted block to a separate, non-aliased `BPF_MAP_TYPE_RINGBUF` using `bpf_ringbuf_output()`, ensuring the verifier statically proves the absence of read-write aliasing and permits maximum loop unrolling.
